column.text:
• Detroit Tigers transferred OF Wenceel Pérez to the 60-day injured list due to a left orbital fracture.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to June 14, with back spasms.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays designated RHP Simeon Woods Richardson for assignment.
• San Francisco Giants designated RHP Wilkin Ramos for assignment.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Boston Red Sox placed top prospect 2B Marcelo Mayer on the 10-day injured list with a bone stress reaction.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
• Toronto Blue Jays recalled RHP Chad Dallas from Triple-A Buffalo.
• Kansas City Royals signed veteran LHP Matt Moore to a minor league contract.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
